email_subject: Application for Allround Medewerker | Premium Outdoor Design
email_body:
Dear Aurea Loontjens,

I am writing to apply for the Allround Medewerker position at Chapeau. With a background in customer service, order management, and logistics, combined with digital skills in e-commerce and operations, I am confident I can contribute to your premium outdoor design team.

In my current role at Episto, I manage client websites end-to-end, including order follow-up and content updates. Previously, at Katoen Natie, I worked in a high-volume logistics environment, ensuring accuracy and efficiency. I am comfortable with administrative tasks, inventory management, and planning deliveries. I also have experience with Shopify-like platforms and digital systems.

I am looking for a varied role that combines office work with hands-on tasks, and I am eager to bring my organizational skills and proactive attitude to your family business. I am based in Zwijndrecht and available for full-time work.

I would love to discuss how my experience aligns with your needs. Thank you for considering my application.

Warm regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Aurea Loontjens,

I am excited to apply for the Allround Medewerker role at Chapeau. Your focus on premium outdoor living and design, combined with a varied role in customer service, logistics, e-commerce, and operations, matches my experience and interests perfectly.

Currently, as a Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage client websites and content, which includes order follow-up, inventory updates, and coordinating with teams to ensure timely delivery. This has given me strong organizational and administrative skills. Prior to that, I worked at Katoen Natie in warehouse and logistics, where I maintained accuracy in a fast-paced environment. I am comfortable with digital systems like Shopify, WordPress, and analytics tools, and I enjoy both administrative and practical work.

I am particularly drawn to the family atmosphere at Chapeau and the opportunity to take ownership of orders from start to finish. I am proactive, detail-oriented, and quick to learn new systems. I speak English and Turkish professionally, and I am currently improving my Dutch (A2 level).

I would welcome the chance to discuss how I can contribute to your team. Thank you for your time and consideration.

Warm regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Experience in order management, customer service, and logistics (Katoen Natie, Episto)
Comfortable with digital systems: Shopify, WordPress, Google Analytics, SEMrush
Administrative and practical skills: inventory follow-up, delivery planning, content management
Proactive and detail-oriented, with a track record of accuracy in fast-paced environments
Based in Zwijndrecht, available for full-time work; Dutch A2 and improving
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

Profile
Junior digital marketer with experience in customer service, order management, logistics, and e-commerce operations. At Episto, I manage client websites and content, including order follow-up and inventory updates. At Katoen Natie, I worked in warehouse logistics, ensuring accuracy and efficiency. Comfortable with digital systems like Shopify, WordPress, and analytics tools. I enjoy varied roles combining administrative and practical tasks. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

Core Skills
- Order management & customer service: order follow-up, inventory management, delivery planning, afterservice
- Logistics & warehouse: accuracy in high-volume environments, stock control, preparing orders
- E-commerce & digital systems: Shopify, WordPress, content management, online collection updates
- SEO & content: on-page SEO, keyword research, blog writing, website content management
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

Experience

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

Projects

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

Education
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

References
Available on request.
